bird.name: 新西兰刺莺属
bird.summary: 新西兰刺莺属（学名：Finschia）是刺嘴莺科下的一个属。 下属物种 本属包括以下物种： 新西兰刺莺 Finschia novaeseelandiae (Gmelin, 1789) 参考文献

relations.subject: 新西兰刺莺属
relations.evidence: These include native beech and podocarp forest, exotic plantations as well as willow, gorse and broom, regenerating forest, mānuka or kānuka scrub forests, the river flats of the east and the higher altitude mountain/silver beech and red/silver beech forests in the mountains. They will happily live in areas from the sea to the treeline
relations.object_summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。
